section_title: application of sections 376 to 387 to foreign companies.--Sections 379 to 387 shall apply to all foreign Combines,
content:
378. application of sections 376 to 387 to foreign companies.--Sections 379 to 387 shall apply to all foreign Combines,
that is to say, campiness falling under the following two classes, namely:--
(a) Combines incorporated outside Bangladesh which, after commencement of this Act establish a place of business within
Bangladesh; and
(b) combines incorporate outside Bangladesh which have before the commencement of this Act, established a place of
business within Bangladesh and continued to have an established place of business with Bangladesh, at the commencement
of this Act.

sub_sections.text:
Combines incorporated outside Bangladesh which, after commencement of this Act establish a place of business within
Bangladesh; and

combines incorporate outside Bangladesh which have before the commencement of this Act, established a place of
business within Bangladesh and continued to have an established place of business with Bangladesh, at the commencement
of this Act.
